title: Fps Optimized
description: Performance-focused Minecraft modpack featuring popular optimization mods and in-game settings to improve responsiveness, reduce stutters, and provide a smoother gameplay experience.
body:
# 🧩 FPS OPTIMIZED – Minecraft Performance Modpack

FPS OPTIMIZED is a lightweight Minecraft modpack focused on improving performance, reducing stutters, and providing a smoother gameplay experience across a wide range of systems.

Built around well-known optimization mods, the pack is designed for players who want improved responsiveness and stability while preserving the vanilla Minecraft experience.

[![dc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98df16a53357ada12b1156235d9bd3a4cd5b4c04.png)](https://discord.gg/hJpFwaZEk2)

---

## 🚀 Overview

FPS OPTIMIZED combines multiple performance-focused mods and configurations into a single easy-to-use package. The goal is to improve rendering efficiency, reduce unnecessary resource usage, and provide a smoother gameplay experience during exploration, building, multiplayer sessions, and everyday survival gameplay.

The modpack requires minimal setup and is suitable for both new and experienced players looking for a more optimized Minecraft experience.

---

## ✨ Features

### 🚀 Performance Improvements

• Includes industry-standard optimization mods
• Improved rendering efficiency and responsiveness
• Reduced stuttering during gameplay

### 🧠 Memory & Stability Enhancements

• Better resource management
• Improved game stability
• Reduced unnecessary background processing

### 🌍 Smoother Gameplay Experience

• Faster world loading
• Improved chunk loading behavior
• More consistent gameplay during exploration

### 🔧 Easy Installation

• Ready-to-play configuration
• No complex setup required

### 🧊 Visual Compatibility

• Compatible with many shaders and resource packs
• Maintains Minecraft's familiar visual style

---

## ⚙️ Included Optimization Mods

• Sodium
• Lithium
• Starlight
• Entity Culling
• Memory Leak Fix
• Krypton
• LazyDFU

*(Included mods may vary between versions.)*

---

## 💻 Recommended For

• Low-end PCs
• Mid-range PCs
• PvP Players
• Survival Players
• Builders
• Multiplayer Servers

---

## 🛠 Compatibility

> Minecraft 1.21 – 1.21.11

---

## 📜 Disclaimer

Performance improvements may vary depending on hardware, installed mods, shaders, resource packs, and game settings.

---

### 👤 Creator

> by **GAMER_TIGE99**
